fields.indication_summary: Kinase inhibitor indicated for adult patients with hormone receptor (HR)-positive, HER2-negative advanced or metastatic breast cancer, in combination with an aromatase inhibitor, fulvestrant, or inavolisib and fulvestrant.

notes: No boxed warning despite being an oncology drug -- contraindications section explicitly states 'None'. Has two distinct, both-legitimate 'Revised:' dates: the Prescribing Information body says 9/2025, while the SPL document's trailing establishment block says 6/2026, a 9-month gap. See revision_dates for both rather than a single collapsed value.
